channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Abandoned shopping trolley, 21st April
item.description:
Abandoned shopping trolley left on pavement outside 59 Hearns Road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 41, Hearns Road, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 50 Shrubland Road, 21st April
item.description:
Cabinet and black household waste bin dumped on street

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Shrubland Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Yet another almost total obstruction of the footway, 21st April
item.description:
The number of the bike is in the attached image. Why does Lime take no action against the people who illegally instruct the footway?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Birkbeck Road, Shacklewell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 26-30 Shrubland Road, 21st April
item.description:
Builders and household items dumped outside block next to paladins

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Shrubland Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Always parking on a double yellow line, 21st April
item.description:
If an emergency vehicle, namely a fire engine wants to turn into Almond Road, that can't. This driver has no consideration.

Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping under 152-175 Wolverton, 21st April
item.description:
Mixed waste

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Alvey Street, Old Kent Road, Greater London

item.title: Sofa dumped, 21st April
item.description:
Sofa left outside block

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Crosslet Street, Walworth, Greater London

item.title: Rubbish dumped, 21st April
item.description:
Some rubbish has been dumped on our cul de sac again
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Petersham Drive, St Paul's Cray, Greater London

item.title: Flytipping of some furniture, 21st April
item.description:
Please remove this flytipped furniture obstacle as it is on public pavement.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 64, Peckham Hill Street, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree branch from County House Blocking pavement, 21st April
item.description:
Tree branch from County House has split landing on the pavement

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 128-136, Beckenham Road, Beckenham, Greater London

item.description:

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hartland Road, London

item.title: Hartland Road junction with Donaldson, 21st April
item.description:

item.title: Multiple areas of grafitti on bike storage, 21st April
item.description:
Lots of graffiti on bike storage which has still not been removed - have reported already

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Peacock Street, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Vehicle abandoned in my parking space for over a month, 21st April
item.description:
Grey Toyota van has been abandoned for over a month in my parking space in E9 5HN and I am unable to park my car. The vehicle is not road taxed either. Please can it be removed.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Daintry Way, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 59 Brondesbury villas, 21st April
item.description:
Pram

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brondesbury Villas, London

item.title: More fly tipping, 21st April
item.description:
